title: Legendary Relics
description: This mod has added some unique curios and a set of armor, which can effectively help you adventure.
body:
This mod has added some simple curios and a set of armor, which can effectively help you adventure.\
You can find them during your exploration\
this mod will not have a 1.20.1 version\
Added compatibility with the Pachuli manual at 2101.1.2.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/116c5a18c1e6ba75041106806727bab0570c0657.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d15c27b6b03bddb3b7b45fafd6355e0ce0e12488.png)

You can, while complying with the ARR protocol:
1. Distribute but do not allow modification of the mod files for this mod.
2. You can add this mod to your integration package while complying with the Mojang Eula protocol.
